overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a group of people gathered around a bonfire on an urban rooftop at night, with large wind turbines and a futuristic city skyline featuring distinctive corporate towers illuminated in the background. The atmosphere combines warm firelight with cool ambient city lighting, creating a moody post-apocalyptic or cyberpunk encampment setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop campfire gathering with wind turbines and city skyline

seated figure in chair facing the bonfire

entered.detail: large active campfire with flames and embers providing primary illumination
large industrial wind turbine silhouetted against the night sky
large industrial wind turbine with three blades
tall illuminated skyscrapers with distinctive spires visible in the distant skyline
industrial ventilation equipment and structures on the rooftop perimeter

segments.scene_description: A static shot captures a nighttime rooftop encampment where survivors gather around a central bonfire. The warm firelight illuminates the seated figures while two large wind turbines frame the background against a distant futuristic skyline. The camera remains fixed, observing the scattered group as they sit and stand around the flames, with industrial rooftop equipment visible in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady observation of a nighttime rooftop encampment where the warmth of a communal fire contrasts with a cold, futuristic horizon. It begins with a fixed perspective on a group of survivors gathered around a central bonfire, their figures illuminated by the flickering orange glow. As the eye wanders across the scene, the warm light of the flames gives way to the industrial textures of rooftop equipment in the foreground. The view then expands to reveal two massive wind turbines framing the background, which lead the gaze toward a distant, illuminated corporate skyline. Finally, the composition settles on the juxtaposition between the intimate, flickering circle of people and the vast, silent scale of the cyberpunk city beyond.
